title: Recipes+
description: Tired of wasting resources? This pack adds metal/block recycling, overhauled stair/slab crafting, and better mob loot (+shedding chickens). Blast raw blocks, clone pottery sherds, and have armor stands with arms! Includes a brand-new achievement.
body:
## Metals Recycling!

Do you find yourself with too many metal items and no idea what to do with them, so you just toss them in a chest and forget they exist? Well, no more! As of 26.1-Snapshot 3, a new 'count' option has been added to furnaces. Enjoy finally decluttering your storage!

### Also, I set armor stands to always have their hands shown!

[If you don't want it, unzip the file, go to: data\recipes_plus\function\tick.mcfunction and delete the last command]

### The datapack adds 167 new recipes at the moment
+1 for the smithing table              
+5 for the stonecutter              
+56 for the blasting furnace

**limited_crafting is true by default; some recipes are unlocked after the item is found or an achievement is made.**

**59 of the new recipes represent slabs being made back into blocks     
56 of the new recipes represent stairs being made into slabs        
23 of the recipes represent the copying of sherds
Chiseled blocks recipes reshaped            
New wool (and moss) logic**             
~~New achievements for killing zombies, skeletons, creepers, spiders and endermen~~

### Let me know if you have any other ideas for this datapack, you can comment on CurseForge


Delayed features:
- Better drops for mobs
- More achievements
- Iron Golem sheds iron


What recipes would not be included:
- Totem of Undying
- Enchanted Golden Apple
- Elytra
- Heart of the sea
- Trident
- ChainMail Armor
- Mob Eggs
- Mob Spawner

_I'll be working on a mod or look for a way to make them as I wish._

### I only posted this datapack on CurseForge and Modrinth!      
    
_The base datapack (recipes_plus-1.2.0_1.21.1) was created using MCreator 2025.2         
Further updates and modifications for compatibility with other versions were made by myself_
